cover: Enterprise architecture diagram on deep Salesforce navy (#032D60) background with subtle dot-grid. Bright Salesforce sky-blue (#00A1E0) glowing header: 'Data Migration Architecture: 500M Records Without Downtime'. Subtitle in white: 'Dual-write, Bulk API v64.0, CDC replay, reconciliation, and phased cutover'. Top-right: circular avatar badge 'Bennie Joseph | Architect'. THREE BRIGHT LAYERS with glowing rounded borders: TOP LAYER 'Source Systems' vivid cyan/blue border — modules 'Legacy CRM', 'Billing DB', 'Document Store' as bright white pill badges with micro icons. MID LAYER 'Migration Control Plane' vivid purple border — modules 'Chunk Planner', 'Bulk API Loader', 'CDC Catch-Up' as bright white pills. BOTTOM LAYER 'Salesforce Target' vivid teal/green border — modules 'Core Objects', 'Big Objects', 'Data 360' as bright white pills. Central glowing node: 'Zero-Downtime Cutover' in Salesforce sky-blue circle with lightning bolt icon, bright dotted connector arrows flowing to all layers. RIGHT PANEL orange border: 'MuleSoft API Gateway' and 'Event Bus / CDC'. BOTTOM STRIP teal background: 'Migration Runbook' → 'Backfill' → 'Dual-Write' → 'Validate' → 'Cutover' with flow arrows. Salesforce cloud watermark very subtle bottom-left. High contrast, sharp rendering, publication-ready.
images: Dark blueprint developer infographic: '500M Salesforce Migration Control Plane'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header '500M Salesforce Migration Control Plane'. Subtitle 'Chunked backfill + CDC catch-up + deterministic reconciliation'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'Idempotent chunks with source_min_id/source_max_id and lock icon', 'Bulk API v64.0 jobs with throughput gauge icon', 'CDC replay with high_watermark_ts and event stream icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'BAD MIGRATION SCRIPT' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'GOOD CONTROL PLANE' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: 'for row in rows: sf.Account.create(row)' and 'offset += 2000', right column green border '// GOOD' code: 'claim_chunk(batch_id)', 'load_bulk_v64(csv)', 'store_job_id(job_id)', 'replay_from(high_watermark)'. BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'External IDs first', 'Replayable failures', 'Business-key reconciliation'. Footer bar: 'Do not migrate 500M records with a loop and hope'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.

Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'Reconciliation Beyond Row Counts'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'Reconciliation Beyond Row Counts'. Subtitle '500M-record migrations need counts, aggregates, hashes, and human sampling'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'Counts: source_count = target_count with calculator icon', 'Aggregates: open_cases_by_region with bar chart icon', 'Hashes: sha256(canonical_fields) with fingerprint icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'BAD VALIDATION' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'GOOD VALIDATION' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: 'assert source_rows == target_rows', right column green border '// GOOD' code: 'assert source_count == target_count', 'assert sum_balance_by_currency()', 'assert aggregate_chunk_hash(records)', 'sample_vip_accounts(region)'. BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'Business aggregates', 'Field-level hashes', 'Exception queues'. Footer bar: 'A matching row count can still hide corrupted business data'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.
